## What

Briefly, what does this PR change?

## Why

The motivation / issue it addresses (link issues with `#`).

## Type

- [ ] Engine / model
- [ ] Data sources
- [ ] Frontend (whitepaper / dashboard)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `python -m engine.pipeline` locally (if engine changed)
- [ ] Updated `docs/methodology.md` (if the model changed)
- [ ] Kept claims honest — no implied returns, no "oracle is live"
